001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithEggGroups;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010/**
011 * Abstraction for accessing and modifying {@link Batch} entities and related views.
012 */
013public interface BatchRepository {
014
015  /**
016   * Returns all batches.
017   *
018   * @return live list of all batches.
019   */
020  LiveData<List<Batch>> getAll();
021
022  /**
023   * Returns a single batch by ID.
024   *
025   * @param id batch ID.
026   * @return live batch with the specified ID.
027   */
028  LiveData<Batch> get(long id);
029
030  /**
031   * Returns all batches associated with a given incubator.
032   *
033   * @param incubatorId incubator ID.
034   * @return live list of batches for the specified incubator.
035   */
036  LiveData<List<Batch>> getByIncubator(long incubatorId);
037
038  /**
039   * Returns a batch together with its egg groups.
040   *
041   * @param id batch ID.
042   * @return live batch-with-groups view for the specified batch.
043   */
044  LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups> getWithGroups(long id);
045
046  /**
047   * Returns all batches together with their egg groups.
048   *
049   * @return live list of batch-with-groups views.
050   */
051  LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>> getAllWithGroups();
052
053  /**
054   * Returns all batches together with their associated incubators.
055   *
056   * @return live list of batch-with-incubator views.
057   */
058  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubator();
059
060  /**
061   * Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by expected hatch date.
062   *
063   * @return live list of batch-with-incubator views ordered by expected hatch date.
064   */
065  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch();
066
067  /**
068   * Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by incubator.
069   *
070   * @return live list of batch-with-incubator views ordered by incubator.
071   */
072  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator();
073
074  /**
075   * Returns all batches with incubator information ordered by batch number.
076   *
077   * @return live list of batch-with-incubator views ordered by batch number.
078   */
079  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber();
080
081  /**
082   * Inserts or updates a batch.
083   *
084   * @param batch batch to save.
085   * @return future completing with the saved batch ID.
086   */
087  CompletableFuture<Long> save(Batch batch);
088
089  /**
090   * Saves a batch and creates its initial egg-group data for the specified breed.
091   *
092   * @param batch batch to save.
093   * @param breed breed name used to initialize the batch's egg groups.
094   * @return future completing with the saved batch ID.
095   */
096  CompletableFuture<Long> saveWithInitialEggGroups(Batch batch, String breed);
097
098  /**
099   * Deletes a batch.
100   *
101   * @param batch batch to delete.
102   * @return future completing when deletion is finished.
103   */
104  CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Batch batch);
105}
